title: トーク番組でハッピー☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while I'm taking a break in the
cafeteria...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Acute! Listen to this!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I got a request to go on a TV show! It's a talk
show, and the topic is feng shui!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: Goodness, Rickey! That's wonderful to hear.
choice_data_list:
Your efforts to spread feng shui have really
paid off.

Your efforts to spread feng shui have really
paid off.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The world is making way for feng shui! If this goes
well, I'll be able to spread its wondrous teachings
to even more people!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
All right! Since I'm going to be talking on TV, I
need to compile some discussion topics! I have to
make it easy for beginners to understand too!
choice_data_list: I'll help any way I can!
I'll help any way I can!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Really?! Then, when I finish putting together my
talking points, will you listen to what I've come up
with? I want you to tell me if there's anything you
don't understand!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Yes, you just knock their socks right off, Rickey.
In fact, I think I might whip up some ohagi to
keep you going.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Yay! I love your ohagi, Acute! ☆

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. ♪ And I'll make sure to come and see you
in all your glory when you're doing your talk
show.

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
Hello there! ♪ Miracles come to those who
believe! It's time for our segment on the spiritual
fates of feng shui! And our guest for today is...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Rickey! ☆ Lucky! ☆ Helloooo! My name's Copano
Rickey! I'm here to tell you all about feng shui so
we can all be happy! ♪

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
Oooh! Your spiritual aura is even stronger in
person! I can just feel the good fortune emanating
from you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Wonder Acute and I are watching from the
audience. It might just be me, but I feel like this
host is using some rather shady words...

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
Hm. We've had a question from someone asking
how to meet their soulmate. This person should
wear something pink! If I remember correctly...
that boosts your luck in love, right?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! The feng shui of colors is deeply
connected to the five elements! And the five
elements are—

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm sorry! We're tight on time, so let's keep it
moving. Next question!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The feng shui you should follow for arranging
your home can vary depending on your house!
Using this compass can help you find a more
accurate way to utilize feng shui.

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
In other words, you pour your holy power into
that device and then—BAM—a miracle happens!
Whoa, how convenient!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear... It looks a bit like Rickey is struggling
to get her voice heard. Just look at her little ears
drooping.
choice_data_list:
We have to support her—even if it's only the
two of us!

We have to support her—even if it's only the
two of us!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
You're quite right.
You can do it, Rickey. We're rooting for you,
dearie.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(It's Trainer and Acute... That's right—I came here
to tell everyone about feng shui! I'm not backing
down now!)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Um! If it's okay with you... Shall we play feng shui
true or false? All the questions are
straightforward so I think people can learn some
useful tips!

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Yes, good idea! I'm sure the audience would
enjoy that!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Here we go. It's better to carry plenty of lucky
items around with you. True or false?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The answer is "false"! Going overboard can have
the opposite effect! ☆ Okay, next: Things like
good and bad directions and lucky colors change
depending on the year and location. True or
false?!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so the answer's true! Hey, this quiz is pretty
fun. I can answer with just a "true" or "false," so
it's not as intimidating!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. Feng shui is more down-to-earth than I
thought. It's got a solid foundation and it actually
seems really deep...

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you did just wonderfully, Rickey. The
audience had such a smashing time.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
That's great to hear! I saw you two cheering for
me too!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
That's great to hear! I saw you two cheering for
me too!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
That's thanks to the courage you two gave me! I'm
still a little sad that I didn't get to talk in much
depth...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
But I did get to introduce some feng shui basics
with that quiz, so it was definitely a success!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Oh Rickey, you did so, so well. And I just know
that all your efforts will bear fruit one day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Wonder Acute embraces Copano Rickey and
gently strokes her back as if to soothe her.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Thanks! I hope you'll both help me out next
time, too!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Because I'm not stopping here! Tomorrow, the
next day, and the day after that—every single
day—I'm going to do my best to make everyone
happier!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: That's the spirit, dearie. Knock all their socks off.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I will! And it's not just the show's audience who
enjoyed it—everyone's talking about it on
Umatter too!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
People are saying they understand feng shui a
little better now, and that they want another true
or false quiz!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Well, that just goes to show that you're getting
somewhere, doesn't it? You've worked so very
hard after all, Rickey.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Wonder Acute gives Copano Rickey a pat on the
head.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
True! Buuuut, I have to make sure I learn from my
mistakes!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I think trying to explain all of it at once was
probably kind of overwhelming, so I need to
make things a little simpler!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Rickey! ☆ Lucky! ☆ Explanation 2.0! I'm going to
do eeeven better next time!
